name: CRUD/all-resource-types-post-stu3
description: Creates and reads every concrete FHIR resource type present in R4, R4B, and R5 but removed after STU3, gated on the target declaring fhirVersion 4.0.x, 4.3.x, or 5.0.x.

variable.name: biologicallyDerivedProductId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created BiologicallyDerivedProduct

variable.name: bodyStructureId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created BodyStructure

variable.name: chargeItemDefinitionId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created ChargeItemDefinition

variable.name: coverageEligibilityRequestId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created CoverageEligibilityRequest

variable.name: coverageEligibilityResponseId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created CoverageEligibilityResponse

variable.name: deviceDefinitionId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created DeviceDefinition

variable.name: eventDefinitionId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created EventDefinition

variable.name: evidenceId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created Evidence

variable.name: evidenceVariableId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created EvidenceVariable

variable.name: exampleScenarioId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created ExampleScenario

variable.name: immunizationEvaluationId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created ImmunizationEvaluation

variable.name: insurancePlanId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created InsurancePlan

variable.name: invoiceId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created Invoice

variable.name: medicationKnowledgeId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created MedicationKnowledge

variable.name: molecularSequenceId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created MolecularSequence

variable.name: observationDefinitionId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created ObservationDefinition

variable.name: organizationAffiliationId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created OrganizationAffiliation

variable.name: serviceRequestId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created ServiceRequest

variable.name: specimenDefinitionId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created SpecimenDefinition

variable.name: verificationResultId
variable.description: The server-assigned id for the created VerificationResult

test.name: Can create and read BiologicallyDerivedProduct
test.description: When the target server declares BiologicallyDerivedProduct create and read interactions, POST /BiologicallyDerivedProduct must create a synthetic BiologicallyDerivedProduct and GET /BiologicallyDerivedProduct/{id} must read it back.

operation.description: POST a synthetic BiologicallyDerivedProduct

assert.description: BiologicallyDerivedProduct create must return HTTP 201 Created
Create response body must be a BiologicallyDerivedProduct
Server must assign an id

operation.description: GET the created BiologicallyDerivedProduct by server-assigned id

assert.description: BiologicallyDerivedProduct read must return HTTP 200 OK
Read response body must be a BiologicallyDerivedProduct
Read id must match the created id
